infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to select receipt photos and screenshots for on-device OCR.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger requires access to your camera to capture receipts for on-device OCR.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ReceiptRanger requires access to save receipt documents to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to select receipt photos and screenshots.
plugins.cameraPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your camera to capture receipts.

plugins.photosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to access and scan receipts.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: ReceiptRanger requires access to your photo library to save receipts.
